channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: [DARK WEB] nightspire ransomware: new victim 'Taylor County Property Appraiser's Office' (US)

item.title: [DARK WEB] everest ransomware: new victim 'First Priority Group' (US)
[DARK WEB] ThreatFox: RedLine Stealer — 1 new IOC detected
[DARK WEB] ThreatFox: XWorm — 8 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with xworm .

item.title: [DARK WEB] ThreatFox: ClearFake — 10 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with clearfake .
